creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
On Tue, 13 Apr 1999, Jacques Vidrine wrote:

> What's a LART?

"Luser attitude readjustment tool". ie a large blunt object such as my
hammer I keep in my desk.

> If you feel this way, then just do it.  There are at least 34 ports
> that depend on a GTK version lower than 1.2.   My feeling is that
> disabling these ports would cause crying among the users, but I could
> be wrong.

It would. Before I do anything drastic, I'll try and upgrade them.

> Personally, I would really like to see ports/x11-toolkits/gtk11-devel
> removed at least.  It was supposed to be temporary until the release
> of GTK 1.2.  However, shortly after the gtk12 port was activated,
> I spent a little time trying to upgrade ports that depended upon
> gtk11-devel, and failed miserably.  Maybe now that a few weeks have
> gone by it wouldn't be so hard.

gtk11-devel SHOULD be removed, I'll look into how many ports can use one
and not the other(gtk12).

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
